meaning: v.摇动,摇,颤抖,震动n.摇动,摇,颤抖,震动
examples: Her hands had started to shake.
She gave him a shake to wake him.
Do people in Italy shake hands when they meet?
He believes Acer can shake up the market regardless, given its corporate heft and strong brand.
As I masticate obediently, a priest stops at our table to shake Nadir's hand.
